feed.title: Olivier Bourgeois: Cloud and backend software developer

entry.title: Two years with Obsidian: How notes changed the way I store information
entry.summary: Quick intro on the note-taking app Obsidian, how I use it, and my takeaways.

entry.title: Monospace: Why use fixed-width fonts in the modern world
entry.summary: A short introduction to monospace fonts and the kind of use cases they still excel at.

entry.title: My personal website: A technical deep dive
entry.summary: A detailed look into the creation of my personal website, from rendering to styling, and everything in between!

entry.title: Hello world: Building your own corner of the web
entry.summary: My personal website is reborn anew! But why a personal website? And how can you also get started building a little corner of the Internet?
